attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
IAM_APPLICATION_KEY     ,      
IAM_USER_KEY             ,     
ASSIGNMENT_TYPE           ,    
STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG  ,   
EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,  
IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT            , 
DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD      ,
DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME         ,
SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            ,
DD_CEC_ID                     ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      ,
START_TV_DT                   ,
END_TV_DT                     ,
BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,
ACTION_CODE,
DML_TYPE             
FROM (SELECT
TVOUTPUT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.IAM_USER_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
TVOUTPUT.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
TVOUTPUT.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
TVOUTPUT.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
TVOUTPUT.DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD,
TVOUTPUT.DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
TVOUTPUT.DD_CEC_ID,
TVOUTPUT.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT,
COALESCE( MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,TVOUTPUT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,TVOUTPUT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,TVOUTPUT.IAM_USER_KEY,TVOUTPUT.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD 
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT  ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING) ,    
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE )) AS END_TV_DT,
TVOUTPUT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,TVOUTPUT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,TVOUTPUT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,TVOUTPUT.IAM_USER_KEY,TVOUTPUT.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC) AS RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND (TT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IS NOT NULL AND TT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL 
													AND TT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY IS NOT NULL AND TT.IAM_USER_KEY IS NOT NULL  AND TT.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD IS NOT NULL)
THEN 'U' 
ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
(SELECT
TVINPUT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
TVINPUT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
TVINPUT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
TVINPUT.IAM_USER_KEY,
TVINPUT.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
TVINPUT.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
TVINPUT.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
TVINPUT.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
TVINPUT.DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD,
TVINPUT.DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME,
TVINPUT.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,
TVINPUT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
TVINPUT.DD_CEC_ID,
TVINPUT.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
TVINPUT.START_TV_DT,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,TVINPUT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,TVINPUT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
								TVINPUT.IAM_USER_KEY,TVINPUT.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,TVINPUT.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
								TVINPUT.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,TVINPUT.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,TVINPUT.DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD,
								TVINPUT.DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME,TVINPUT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,TVINPUT.DD_CEC_ID,
								TVINPUT.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,TVINPUT.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD ORDER BY UPDATE_DATE DESC) AS ROW_NUM
FROM (SELECT
		SIEURSH.ROLE_NAME		AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
		NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY		AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
		SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY		AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
		NIU.IAM_USER_KEY		AS IAM_USER_KEY,
		SIEURSH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE		AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
		SIEURSH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG	AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
		SIEURSH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG		AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
		SIEURSH.LVL_NUMBER		AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
		NST.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE	AS DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD,
		NST.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME,
		COALESCE(SIEURSH.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,'DR')    AS BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,
		CASE WHEN SIEURSH.STATUS = 'A' THEN 'N' 
			 WHEN SIEURSH.STATUS = 'I' THEN 'Y'
		END	SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
		NIU.DD_CEC_ID		AS DD_CEC_ID,
		NST.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR     AS DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
		FDT.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS START_TV_DT,
		SIEURSH.UPDATE_DATE
		FROM
		(SELECT
		EIEURSH.ROLE_NAME,
		EIEURSH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
		EIEURSH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG,
		EIEURSH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG	,
		EIEURSH.LVL_NUMBER,
		EIEURSH.STATUS,
		EIEURSH.UPDATE_DATE,
		EIEURSH.TOOL_ID,
		EIEURSH.ERP_SEGMENT1,
		EIEURSH.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,
		EIEURSH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE,
		EIEURSH.IAM_USER_ID,
		EIEURSH.CREATE_DATETIME
		FROM
		$$EXCEPDB.EX_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_SHR_HIER EIEURSH
		UNION
		SELECT
		SIEURSH.ROLE_NAME,
		SIEURSH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
		SIEURSH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG,
		SIEURSH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG,
		SIEURSH.LVL_NUMBER,
		SIEURSH.STATUS,
		SIEURSH.UPDATE_DATE,
		SIEURSH.TOOL_ID,
		SIEURSH.ERP_SEGMENT1,
		SIEURSH.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,
		SIEURSH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE,
		SIEURSH.IAM_USER_ID,
		SIEURSH.CREATE_DATETIME
		FROM
		$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_SHR_HIER SIEURSH)  SIEURSH
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL IAC
		ON ( SIEURSH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A' )
		INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
		ON SIEURSH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
		ON (CASE WHEN SIEURSH.ERP_SEGMENT1 ='CORP. REVENUE'
		THEN 'WW_SALES'
		ELSE SIEURSH.ERP_SEGMENT1 END)=NST.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
		AND NST.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
		AND SIEURSH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE IN ('CORP.REVENUE','SALES-L7')
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
		ON SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=SIEURSH.TOOL_ID
		INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
		ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT=SIEURSH.IAM_USER_ID
		LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK NIST
		ON NIST.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AND NIST.IAM_USER_KEY=NIU.IAM_USER_KEY
		AND NIST.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME=SIEURSH.ROLE_NAME AND NIST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
		AND NIST.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD=SIEURSH.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FDT
		ON  CAST(SIEURSH.UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) = FDT.CALENDAR_DATE
		WHERE NOT(SIEURSH.TOOL_ID = 1388 AND SIEURSH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG='S' AND SIEURSH.ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%')
		UNION ALL
		SELECT                        /* GET 3500 ROWS FROM 3NF ROWS */
		TTV.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
		TTV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
		TTV.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
		TTV.IAM_USER_KEY,
		TTV.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
		TTV.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
		TTV.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
		TTV.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
		TTV.DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD,
		TTV.DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME,
		TTV.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,
		TTV.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
		TTV.DD_CEC_ID,
		TTV.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
		TTV.START_TV_DT ,
		TTV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS UPDATE_DATE
		FROM
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK_TV ttv
		WHERE
		END_TV_DT = CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
		AND EXISTS(Select 1 from 
(SELECT ROLE_NAME,IAM_USER_KEY,IAM_APPLICATION_KEY FROM 
(Select ROLE_NAME,IAM_USER_ID,TOOL_ID FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_SHR_HIER
UNION ALL
Select ROLE_NAME,IAM_USER_ID,TOOL_ID FROM $$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_SHR_HIER ) SIEUR
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_IAM_APPLICATION SIAA
		ON SIAA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=SIEUR.TOOL_ID
		INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIUU
		ON NIUU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT=SIEUR.IAM_USER_ID) INNER_3NF
		WHERE ttv.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME=INNER_3NF.ROLE_NAME
		and ttv.IAM_USER_KEY=INNER_3NF.IAM_USER_KEY
		and ttv.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=INNER_3NF.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY)
		)TVINPUT
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,TVINPUT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,	TVINPUT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,				TVINPUT.IAM_USER_KEY,TVINPUT.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT
													    ORDER BY TVINPUT.UPDATE_DATE DESC) = 1
		) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK_TV TT
	ON (TVOUTPUT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = TT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
	AND TVOUTPUT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = TT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
	AND TVOUTPUT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = TT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
	AND TVOUTPUT.IAM_USER_KEY = TT.IAM_USER_KEY AND TVOUTPUT.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD=TT.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD)
	AND TT.END_TV_DT = CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1) A

SELECT
SIEURSH.IAM_USER_ID,                   
SIEURSH.ROLE_ID,                       
SIEURSH.ROLE_NAME,                     
SIEURSH.TOOL_ID,                       
SIEURSH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE,              
SIEURSH.LVL_NUMBER,                    
SIEURSH.ERP_SEGMENT1,                  
SIEURSH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,               
SIEURSH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG,            
SIEURSH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG,               
SIEURSH.RESTRICTION_FLAG,              
SIEURSH.PROXY_FLAG,                    
SIEURSH.GRANTOR_UNIVERSAL_ID,          
SIEURSH.GRANTOR_CEC_ID,                
SIEURSH.GRANTOR_CCO_ID,                
SIEURSH.STATUS,                        
SIEURSH.TR_FLAG,                       
SIEURSH.LAST_ACTION,                   
SIEURSH.CREATED_BY,                    
SIEURSH.CREATE_DATE,                   
SIEURSH.UPDATED_BY,                    
SIEURSH.UPDATE_DATE,
SIEURSH.ACTION_CODE,                   
SIEURSH.BATCH_ID,                      
SIEURSH.CREATE_DATETIME,               
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
COALESCE(SIEURSH.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,'DR')
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_SHR_HIER SIEURSH
WHERE SIEURSH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE IN ('CORP.REVENUE','SALES-L7')
AND NOT ((TOOL_ID = 1388 AND DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG='S'  AND ROLE_NAME LIKE  '%IBOT%' ) OR (LVL_NUMBER =7 AND TOOL_ID=1388))
AND( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
WHERE SIEURSH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME )
OR NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL IAC
WHERE SIEURSH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A' )
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
WHERE NST.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE=(CASE WHEN SIEURSH.ERP_SEGMENT1 
='CORP. REVENUE'
THEN 'WW_SALES'
ELSE SIEURSH.ERP_SEGMENT1 END) 
AND NST.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE')
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
WHERE SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=SIEURSH.TOOL_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
WHERE  NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT=SIEURSH.IAM_USER_ID))
